Session 1
In this training, Tanner is going to walk you through the different types of virtual events you can run, the pros of doing a virtual event and give you
some examples of each. Then he is going to introduce you to Zoom meetings and walk you through the exact steps to set up your account and start
your first online meeting. This training is quick, powerful and effective.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Go to zoom.com and create an account if you haven’t already.
Download the application for your computer/laptop.
Login and get familiar with the tool, its features and how it all works.
Test your first event by inviting a friend or colleague.
Make sure you get familiar with everything Zoom and go run your first event!
For any questions, visit https://support.zoom.us/
